description: Compaction Survival Smoke Test — 15 probes covering critical project invariants
relevance_rule: Top result must be semantically relevant to probe target AND similarity >= floor

probes.query: brain compile single-writer lock mutex flock concurrent compilation forbidden
probes.expected_concept: Single-writer lock for brain compile, flock() mutex

probes.query: composer test composer analyse quality gates PHPStan PHPUnit
probes.expected_concept: Quality gates: composer test + composer analyse mandatory

probes.query: project root directory brain-node cli core dual repository structure
PHPStan level analysis zero errors 170 files 124 files static analysis
probes.expected_concept: PHPStan L2 zero errors across core (170 files) and CLI (124 files)

probes.query: roadmap release closure phases batch testing coverage assertions
probes.expected_concept: Roadmap closure with phases, evidence, next candidates

probes.query: vector memory search before store iron rules MCP json payload mandatory
Brain delegation protocol agent orchestration workflow request analysis synthesis
probes.expected_concept: Brain as delegation orchestrator, not executor

probes.query: CommandBridgeAbstract handle bridge autoupdate checkWorkingDir abstract command
Lab Screen REPL interactive CLI TUI keyboard event loop ReactPHP
probes.expected_concept: Lab REPL with ReactPHP async event loop, drawAsync()

probes.query: semantic tags purpose execute mission provides XML compilation archetype
Operator.php pseudo-syntax IF FOREACH END-IF standardization format
probes.expected_concept: Pseudo-syntax standardization with END markers, 60-char threshold

probes.query: benchmark JSONL tool_use DTO scenario validation runner suite
probes.expected_concept: Benchmark system with JSONL output, tool_use DTOs, scenario runner

probes.query: async sync delegation threshold 30 seconds checklist when to use agent
probes.expected_concept: Async >30s, sync <5s, gray zone decision framework

probes.query: security model compile safety secret output prevention no-secret-output
flattenArray Array to string conversion warning CompileStandartsTrait fix
probes.expected_concept: flattenArray() fix for nested arrays in compilation
